$comment: Target Framer CMS collection shape for Clients + integration marquee. Align your live Framer collection to these fields; source rows: cms-clients.csv (12 items).

recommendedFields.notes: Logo asset; framerusercontent URLs from CSV are valid when re-uploaded or linked in Framer.
External client URL; open in new tab in list item if desired.
Use for image alt text / accessibility; falls back to company if identical.
Optional if Title covers display name.
Useful for detail pages; not required for marquee only.
Filter CMS List: Role equals Client to exclude non-clients later.
Optional sort order for marquee (ascending) when alphabetical is wrong.
If false, filter list so logo is hidden from ticker without deleting the client.

auditChecklist: Every CMS item has Image populated (no empty slots in list preview).
Link field opens the correct URL in preview.
Title (or Company) is set for each item for alt text.
CMS List on canvas uses Collection: Clients and consistent sort (Title or Order).
